Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 1030 POLK ASSOCIATES, L.P.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: BRIAN P. VILLARREAL, ESQUIRE (BARTKO ZANKEL, 415.956.1900) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. PETER LEVY, ESQUIRE (NO PHONE NUMBER) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR 12365

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 1030 POLK ASSOCIATES, L.P.'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.
APPEARANCES: BRIAN P. VILLARREAL, ESQUIRE (BARTKO ZANKEL, 415.956.1900) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. PETER LEVY, ESQUIRE (NO PHONE NUMBER) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS THE BURDEN OF PROOF TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE COVERS THIS DISPUTE. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PRESENT ANY EVIDENCE AS TO "PARTIAL DESTRUCTION OF THE PREMISES" OR THAT THE BUILDING WAS DECLARED "UNSAFE OR UNFIT FOR OCCUPANCY BY ANY AUTHORIZED PUBLIC AUTHORITY." DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE THAT P.G.& E., A PRIVATE COMPANY PERFORMING SERVICES AS A PUBLIC UTILITY, IS A "PUBLIC AUTHORITY" WITHIN THE MEANING OF THE PARTIES AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE BRAZIL DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED. COURT FURTHER SUSTAINS OBJECTIONS ON THE BRAZIL DECLARATION AS IT RELATES TO THE TRUTH OF THE MATTER ASSERTED (SEE RECORD FOR SPECIFICS). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR 12365
